entities.driver: a driver gripping the steering wheel

scenes.title: The Traffic Jam
scenes.background_prompt: A city street packed with cars bumper to bumper, traffic lights showing red, buildings on both sides, and a crosswalk. Dull overcast light. No people visible from this angle, no visible car interiors.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A city street in dull overcast light. A car — a silver sedan — is stuck in a long line of bumper-to-bumper traffic. Through the windshield, the driver is visible: a man in a white dress shirt with the sleeves rolled up, gripping the steering wheel with both hands so tightly his knuckles are pale. His face is contorted with frustration — brows furrowed deeply, mouth pressed into a hard line, eyes glaring at the line of brake lights stretching ahead. On the dashboard, a phone shows a navigation app with a sea of red indicating heavy traffic. The clock on the dashboard reads 8:47 AM. Other cars pack the lanes in both directions. Traffic lights ahead glow red. Tall office buildings line both sides of the street. A pedestrian crosswalk is just visible ahead, empty.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place driver in the car (visible through windshield), gripping the steering wheel with both hands, knuckles pale, face contorted with frustration. Place car in a long line of bumper-to-bumper traffic.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left corner, a patch of green grass is dotted with small white and yellow flowers, bordered by a grey sidewalk. Moving right, a grey car is partially visible, followed by a brown car and a yellow car lined up along the curb. Behind these cars stands a black traffic light pole on the sidewalk corner; it features two signal boxes, with the forward-facing one showing a red light at the top. To the left of the pole is a large, two-story building with a stone-textured base, tan walls, and several arched windows under a brown roof. Lush green and yellow trees are nestled between the buildings. In the center foreground, a grey asphalt road is marked with a white-striped crosswalk. At the front of the center-right lane sits a large orange car. Inside, a driver with brown hair and a green shirt looks forward with a frustrated, angry expression, his hands gripping the steering wheel. Behind this orange car is a tan van, followed by a line of various cars stretching into the distance. To the left of the orange car, another lane of traffic features a grey car, an orange car, and a light blue car. Further left, a third lane contains a yellow car, a grey car, and a light blue car. On the right side of the road, a yellow car is stopped next to a light blue car and a tan car. A second black traffic light pole stands on the right sidewalk corner, its forward-facing signal also showing a red light. Behind it, several tan and brown buildings with rounded windows and brown roofs line the street, interspersed with green, yellow, and blue-toned trees. In the far right foreground, another patch of green grass with white and yellow flowers sits next to the sidewalk. The background shows the street receding into the distance under a pale blue sky filled with several large, fluffy white clouds, indicating a bright, clear day in a busy urban setting.

CH: a man in a green shirt
a person with a frustrated face
S: a busy city street at midday
a pale blue sky with clouds
IE: a long line of cars stopping
P: wanting to drive through the intersection
hoping the traffic starts moving soon
A: waiting for the light to change
CO: cars backed up down the street
the driver being stuck in traffic
